This is a standalone GitHub Copilot workshop exercise.

Optimize for teaching value, clear code, and repeatable local demos. Learners should build the app from scratch using the spec, data exports, and skills in this folder.

Use the stack and commands defined by the project files and spec. Avoid extra dependencies unless the benefit is obvious and explained.

Keep data handling deterministic. Prefer small pure helpers for parsing, joining, calculations, sorting, and business rules.

Keep the frontend simple: semantic HTML, accessible labels, readable CSS, and browser APIs. Do not add frameworks, bundlers, state libraries, or design systems unless the spec explicitly requires them.

Never add real confidential, personal, regulated, or customer data. Do not add authentication, external integrations, deployment, CI/CD, or email delivery unless the spec explicitly requires them.
